data.name: AnduinOS Enterprise Edition adds enterprise-grade customer support and 7×24 phone on-call on top of the community edition.
data.value: AnduinOS Enterprise Edition adds enterprise-grade customer support and 7×24 phone on-call on top of the community edition.

data.name: Brand the OS with your company logo, pre-installed software, and compliance requirements.
data.value: Brand the OS with your company logo, pre-installed software, and compliance requirements.

data.name: Build your own intranet software sources to accelerate compliance and reduce patching turnaround time.
data.value: Build your own intranet software sources to accelerate compliance and reduce patching turnaround time.

data.name: Easily achieve zero-trust and hardware-level security based on Yubico hardware keys.
data.value: Easily achieve zero-trust and hardware-level security based on Yubico hardware keys.

data.name: Enterprise customers get round-the-clock telephone support, ensuring critical issues are addressed immediately.
data.value: Enterprise customers get round-the-clock telephone support, ensuring critical issues are addressed immediately.

data.name: Freedom and enterprise service don't conflict.
data.value: Freedom and enterprise service don't conflict.

data.name: IT teams can monitor the health of all endpoints and perform basic remote management.
data.value: IT teams can monitor the health of all endpoints and perform basic remote management.

data.name: Meet industry compliance requirements with auditable configurations and enterprise-grade controls.
data.value: Meet industry compliance requirements with auditable configurations and enterprise-grade controls.
